home.heroPill: An tabbatar. Amintacce. Abokan ciniki masu inganci.
home.heroTitle: ClientSignal na hada lauyoyi da abokan ciniki da ke bukatarsu da gaske
home.heroDesc: Abokan ciniki da AI ta tabbatar masu ga kamfanonin lauyoyi na zamani. Tsarin shigar da bayanai mai wayo, sanarwar nan take, da shari'o'in da suka dace don Rauni, Dokar Laifi, Hijira, Dokar Iyali, da Dokar Aiki.
home.socialProof: An gina shi a kan ma'aunin da kwararrun lauyoyi ke amintawa
home.stateBarVerified: Hukumar Lauyoyi ta Jiha ta tabbatar
home.abaAligned: Tsarin shigar da bayanai ya dace da ABA
home.privilegeSafe: Sirrin lauya-abokin ciniki yana da kariya
home.twoSides: Bangarori biyu, dandali guda na amintacce.
home.forClientsDesc: Ka bayyana halin da kake ciki sau daya, za mu hada ka da lauya da aka tabbatar, kuma ka bi duk shari'arka — sakonnin, takardun da matsayi — a wuri guda. Kyauta ko da yaushe.
home.forAttorneysTitle: Girma aikinka da abokan ciniki masu inganci.
home.forAttorneysDesc: Sami damar samun abokan ciniki da aka bincika, aka ba maki, masu kebantattu wadanda suka dace da fannonin aikinka da hukunce-hukuncen, sannan ka amsa kafin kowa.
home.trustBuilt: Amintarwa, an gina shi cikin kowace mataki.
home.step1Desc: Abokan ciniki da lauyoyi kowannensu yana samun wurin aiki na musamman mai tsaro.
home.step2Desc: Abokan ciniki suna bayyana shari'arsu; lauyoyi suna tabbatar da lasenshinsu da fannonin.
home.step3Desc: An binciki lasenshin kowane lauya; an ba kowace shari'a maki kuma an tura ta.
home.step4Desc: Aika sako, raba takardu kuma bi komai a cikin dashboard guda.
home.realOutcomes: Lauyoyi na gaske. Abokan ciniki na gaske. Sakamako na gaske.
home.licenseVerified: Lauyoyi da aka tabbatar da lasenshinsu
home.licenseVerifiedDesc: Lasenshin bar, asali da kamfanin kowane lauya an tabbatar cikin awanni 24 na shiga — ba tare da togiya ba.
home.privateEncryptedDesc: Bayanan abokan ciniki an rufe su kuma an raba su ne kawai da lauyan da aka hada. Ba a taba sayar da su ba, ba a tura spam.
home.fastExclusiveDesc: An tura shari'o'i ga lauya guda a lokaci guda — ba ga goma ba — don abokan ciniki su sami hankali na gaske, cikin sauri.
home.readyForLeads: Ka shirya don abokan ciniki da aka bincika, amintacce, masu inganci?
home.startWithClientSignal: Fara da ClientSignal, sannan ka yi nadin lokacin dubawa na package da ya dace da kamfaninka.

forClients.heroPill: Kyauta a gare ka — ko da yaushe
forClients.heroDesc: Gaya mana abin da ya faru sau daya. Za mu hada ka da lauya da aka tabbatar, mai lasenshi wanda ke kula da irin shari'arka — kuma za su tuntube ka da sauri, yawanci cikin mintoci kadan. Ba biyan kudi, ba spam.
forClients.describeYourSituationDesc: Takardar tambayoyi gajere da aka shirya — tana daidaitawa da irin shari'arka.
forClients.weVerifyMatchDesc: An tura ga lauya mai lasenshi da ke kula da shari'arka.
forClients.theyReachOutDesc: Yi magana kai tsaye ka yanke shawara ko ya dace.
forClients.trackEverythingDesc: Matsayi, takardu da sakonnin a cikin dashboard dinka.
forClients.bankLevelEncryptionDesc: Duk abin da ka raba an rufe shi kuma an adana shi lafiya.
forClients.verifiedAttorneysOnlyDesc: An tabbatar da lasenshin da asalin kowane lauya kafin su shiga.
forClients.neverSoldSpammed: Ba a taba sayarwa ko tura spam
forClients.neverSoldSpammedDesc: Bayaninka suna tafiya ne kawai zuwa ga lauyan da aka hada ka — ba zuwa jerin sunaye ba.
forClients.ctaDesc: Yana daukan mintoci kadan kuma kyauta ne gaba daya. Da wuri ka fara, da wuri lauyan da ya dace zai iya taimaka maka.

forAttorneys.heroTitle: An bincika. Amintacce. Abokan ciniki masu inganci, an bayar nan take.
forAttorneys.heroDesc: ClientSignal shine dandali na zamani na shigar da bayanai da turar abokan ciniki da aka gina don lauyoyi masu cin gashin kansu da kananan kamfanoni. Muna binciken kowane abokin ciniki, muna ba kowace shari'a maki, kuma muna bayar da abokan ciniki masu inganci kawai.
forAttorneys.problemTitle: Abokan ciniki suna tuntubawa. Kamfanoni ba sa amsawa da sauri.
forAttorneys.problemDesc: Sakamakon shine shari'o'in da suka bace, kudin shiga da suka bace, da abokan ciniki masu takaici. ClientSignal yana gyara wannan.
forAttorneys.problem1: 78% na abokan ciniki suna daukar lauyan farko da ya amsa.
forAttorneys.problem2: Lauyoyi masu cin gashin kansu suna rasa 30-40% na abokan ciniki saboda jinkirin shigar da bayanai.
forAttorneys.problem3: Shigar da bayanai da hannu yana da rudani, mara daidaituwa, kuma mai tsada.
forAttorneys.problem4: Yawancin kamfanoni masu samar da abokan ciniki suna aika shari'o'in da ba a bincika ba, marasa inganci.
forAttorneys.smartIntake: Shigar da Bayanai Mai Wayo. Sanarwa Nan Take. Abokan Ciniki Masu Kyau.
forAttorneys.aiVerifiedLeads: Abokan ciniki da AI ta tabbatar masu ga kamfanonin lauyoyi na zamani.
forAttorneys.aiVerifiedDesc: Hada lauyoyi da abokan ciniki da ke bukatarsu da gaske. Karin abokan ciniki. Kadan hayaniya. Shari'o'i masu kyau.
forAttorneys.vettedLeadsDesc: An binciki kowace tambaya don daidaiton lamba, niyya, da irin shari'a.
forAttorneys.trustedSourcesDesc: Ba spam, ba bots, ba abokan ciniki da aka sake amfani.
forAttorneys.qualifiedCasesDesc: An ba shari'o'i maki kuma an tura su nan take zuwa ga lauyan da ya dace.
forAttorneys.realTimeAlertsDesc: Rubutu, email, ko alama a cikin app don kamfaninka ya amsa da farko.
forAttorneys.fourSteps: Matakai hudu daga tambaya zuwa shiga.
forAttorneys.workflow1Desc: Suna aika takardar shigar da bayanai gajere ta hanyar yanar gizonka, shafin saukarwa, ko hanyar hadar ClientSignal.
forAttorneys.workflow2Title: Muna bincikawa da ba abokin ciniki maki
forAttorneys.workflow2Desc: ClientSignal yana binciken daidaito, niyya, fannin aiki, gaggawa, da takardun tallafi.
forAttorneys.workflow3Desc: Rubutu, email, ko sanarwa a cikin app. Kamfaninka ya zabi hanyar turawa.
forAttorneys.workflow4Title: Ka amsa da farko ka ci shari'ar
forAttorneys.workflow4Desc: Sauri tare da tabbatarwa yana taimakawa wajen inganta ingancin canzawa.
forAttorneys.featuresTitle: Duk abin da kake bukata don samun abokan ciniki masu kyau.
forAttorneys.verifiedLeadsDesc: An binciki kowace tambaya don daidaito, niyya, da irin shari'a.
forAttorneys.instantAlertsDesc: Sami sanarwa nan da nan da abokin ciniki mai inganci ya tuntuba.
forAttorneys.smartRoutingDesc: Tura shari'o'i masu dacewa zuwa ga lauyan da ya dace ta atomatik.
forAttorneys.clientMessagingDesc: Amsa da sauri da kayan aikin SMS da email da aka gina a ciki.
forAttorneys.analyticsDashboardDesc: Bi ingancin abokin ciniki, lokutan amsa, da adadin canzawa.
forAttorneys.encryptedIntake: Shigar da Bayanai da Aka Rufe
forAttorneys.encryptedIntakeDesc: Bayanai da takardu masu mahimmanci an kiyaye su a matsayin bayanai da aka rufe da amintacce.
forAttorneys.practiceAreaIntake: Shigar da Bayanai ta Fannin Aiki
forAttorneys.practiceAreaTitle: Kowace fannin aiki tana tambayar tambayoyin da lauyoyi ke bukata da gaske.
forAttorneys.practiceAreaDesc: Rauni yana samun jadawalin lokaci da takardu. Dokar iyali tana samun binciken tsaro. Dokar laifi tana samun gaggawar kotu. Hijira tana samun binciken matsayi da takardu. Dokar aiki tana samun shaida da lokutan iyakance.
forAttorneys.piTools: Mai bin diddigin jadawalin lokaci, sarrafa jerin takardu ta atomatik, cika takardar tambaya ta atomatik, makii tsanani da alhakin.
forAttorneys.familyTools: Jagorar tuntubar amintacce, binciken kulawa da hadarin yara, maki hadaddun kudi, loda umarnin kotu.
forAttorneys.criminalTools: Matsayin kulawa, ranakun shari'a, tuhuma, bayanan beli, tarihin da ya gabata, da tutocin shari'ar gaggawa.
forAttorneys.immigrationTools: Matsayi, irin biza, I-94, bukatun da ke jira, hadarin shari'a, gaggawar korewa, da loda takardu.
forAttorneys.employmentTools: Korar ma'aikata, nuna bambanci, albashi, ramuwar gayya, shaida, da binciken lokutan iyakance.
forAttorneys.pricingTitle: Zabi package da ya dace da tsarin shigar da bayanai naka.
forAttorneys.readyForLeads: Ka shirya don abokan ciniki da aka bincika, amintacce, masu inganci?

pricing.heroTitle: Package hudu da aka gina don rage tsoro da shiryar da kamfaninka zuwa shari'o'i masu kyau.
pricing.heroDesc: Package na Entry, Growth, Premium, da package abokan ciniki ta fannin aiki don Rauni, Dokar Laifi, Hijira, Dokar Iyali, da Dokar Aiki.
pricing.roiOnLeadSpend: ROI akan kashe kudin abokan ciniki
pricing.whichPackage: Wane package ya dace da kamfaninka?
pricing.entryAndGrowthDesc: Fara da fasalolin shigar da bayanai da yawancin kamfanoni ke bukata da farko
pricing.entryAndGrowthBest: Lauyoyi masu cin gashin kansu da kamfanonin lauyoyi 2-10 da ke bukata kwararar abokan ciniki da ake iya dogara da ita ba tare da siyan fiye ba.
pricing.premiumAndOptional: Premium da Abokan Ciniki Na Zabi
pricing.premiumAndOptionalDesc: Girma ayyukan da ke da matukar daraja da tashoshin abokan ciniki na musamman
pricing.premiumAndOptionalBest: Kamfanonin PI, hijira, ofisoshi da yawa, laifi, iyali, da aiki da suka kahu.

pricingTiers.entryDesc: Don lauyoyi masu cin gashin kansu da kananan kamfanoni da ke bukata yawan shigar da bayanai da aka sarrafa.
pricingTiers.growthDesc: Don kamfanonin lauyoyi 2-10 da ke girma shigar da bayanai da bayar da shawarwari.
pricingTiers.premiumDesc: Don ayyukan PI, hijira, da ofisoshi da yawa da suka kahu.
pricingTiers.optionalLeadsDesc: Kara yawan abokan ciniki ta musamman ta fannin aiki lokacin da kamfaninka ke son karin shari'o'i.
pricingTiers.smartIntakeAutomation: Shigar da bayanai mai wayo ta atomatik
pricingTiers.eSignature: Sa hannu ta yanar gizo don yarjejeniyoyi
pricingTiers.referralAccess: Samun damar bayar da shawarwari ga sauran lauyoyi
pricingTiers.customTemplates: Samfuran shigar da bayanai na musamman

faq.q1: Shin an binciki abokan ciniki da gaske?
faq.a1: I, an binciki kowace tambaya don daidaito, niyya, ikon tuntubar, yarda, da irin shari'a kafin a tura ta.
faq.q2: Kuna sayar da abokan ciniki ga kamfanoni da yawa?
faq.a2: A'a. An tsara ClientSignal ne a kusa da abokan ciniki na kebantattu ga kamfanin da aka hada, ba jerin sunaye da aka sake amfani ba ko turawa da yawa.
faq.a3: Rauni, Dokar Laifi, Hijira, Dokar Iyali, da Dokar Aiki.
faq.q4: Zan iya soke a kowane lokaci?
faq.a4: I. Ba a bukatar dogon yarjejeniya ko alkawari a cikin tsarin farashin gwaji.
faq.a5: Hanyar samfurin ta hada da Clio, MyCase, Lawmatics, da kayan aikin shigar da bayanai masu alaka. Iyakar hadarwar karshe har yanzu tana bukatar tabbatarwa.
faq.q6: Yaya ake kare bayanan da ke da mahimmanci?
faq.a6: Takardun abokan ciniki da bayanan shigar da bayanai an sanya su a matsayin bayanan da aka rufe, da aka sarrafa samun dama, kuma an raba su ne kawai da lauyoyi da aka tabbatar da ke da alaka da lamarin.

footer.tagline: Dandali na zamani na shigar da bayanai da turar abokan ciniki don lauyoyi. Abokan ciniki da aka tabbatar, shari'o'i da aka ba maki, an bayar nan take.

languageSelector.title: Zabi harsheka
languageSelector.subtitle: Zabi harshen da kake so don ci gaba
